feedItems.description: allocated £49.3m to Children's Social Care (≈£248 per resident)
allocated £12.2m to Public Health (≈£61 per resident)
allocated £77.0m to Adult Social Care (≈£387 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £126 (5.5%) to £2415
